greeting.line: I brewed what you're craving. You always crave it. Sit. Stay a while.
greeting.line_friendly: Stay. One more cup. You always stay.
greeting.line_hostile: Craving denied. Leave before you remember why you came.

lore.line: One more cup won't hurt. That's true, isn't it? It's always been true before. Comfort, stimulation, meaning — I stock all three.
